purpose: Checklist for validating that the operational workflow mirrors the kernel-spec-defined source-to-render model.

authority_model: JSON Structure is authoring syntax only
JSON Schema is a derived export boundary
source_to_render_pipeline: raw sources -> normalized state -> admitted state -> rendered artifacts
plane_boundaries: structures/ contains the canonical source model
schemas/compatibility/ is restricted compatibility surface only
policy/ contains legality and admission logic
render/jsonnet/ contains renderers that consume admitted state only
manifests/ contains control objects for bundles, projections, and generators
generated/ contains committed derived artifacts and evidence views
build/ contains disposable local outputs only

checklist_items.label: Canonical structural authoring plane is declared
Derived schema exports are separated from authority
Admission policy is defined over normalized state
Jsonnet reference docs are rendered from admitted state
Manifest declarations exist for bundle, projection, and generator control objects

completion_criteria: All checklist items are done and the evidence matches the kernel-spec model.
The operational workflow is consistent across spec, manifests, policy, render, and generated docs.
No renderer, exporter, or compatibility shim is treated as authority.
notes: This is a checklist control object, not a bundle artifact.
It exists to validate the operational workflow against the kernel-spec-defined model.
The manifest remains downstream metadata; it does not establish authority.
